Be aware of the following points when using the Cloud.

-If you synchronize materials in an environment where many materials are registered,
 the first synchronization may take a long time due to the large amount of data that is being transferred.
- Please do not use this function on a mobile line.
- If target data is being operated or edited, it will be skipped.
- Transmission will start simultaneously after setting changes for [Use]. Since the transmission can influence the drawing operation of the pen,
 please wait until it is finished, if you are concerned about this.
- For further information, please also read the “User's Guide to the Cloud” in advance from the [Help] menu ([?] Button on the upper right of the screen).
